scripts.cf:pages:config:download: npx wrangler pages download config cash-guardian
scripts.cf:pages:dev: node scripts/ensure-wrangler-config.mjs && npx wrangler pages dev
scripts.cf:pages:deploy: node scripts/ensure-wrangler-config.mjs && npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy
scripts.cf:pages:deploy:production: node scripts/ensure-wrangler-config.mjs && npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy --branch main
scripts.cf:pages:deploy:preview: node scripts/ensure-wrangler-config.mjs && npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy --branch preview
